title: Minecart Turning Reforged
description: MC-201 fix; player camera turns with minecart (and other uncontrolled entities)
body:
## Minecart Turning Reforged

This is a Forge port of [Minecart Turning](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecart-turning) for Fabric. It fixes [MC-201](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-201) so players rotate with minecarts as well as when on uncontrolled pigs, untamed horses, secondary boat passengers, etc. The mod will also add a keybinding to toggle the mod on and off.

#### Compatibility
This mod is built for 1.20.1, but does support 1.20~1.20.4 (all Minecraft 1.20.x versions using JAVA 17).
